title: Immunofluorescence staining
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4o268","text":"This protocol describes the immunofluorescence staining of cells.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"11mlq","text":"Cell culture materials:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":23}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1osl0","text":"DMEM (Thermo Fisher Scientific, 11965-092)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8i6pi","text":"FBS (Thermo Fisher Scientific, 16140-071)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cql56","text":"Penicillin/Streptomicin (10,000 U/mL; Thermo Fisher Scientific, 15140122)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7aols","text":"PBS\t(Thermo Fisher Scientific, 10010023)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ds54g","text":"Earle’s Balanced Salt Solution (EBSS; Thermo Fisher Scientific, 24010043)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b6gdu","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4sulr","text":"16% Paraformaldehyde (Electron Microscopy Sciences, 15710)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"29ojo","text":"Bovine serum albumin (BSA; Sigma-Aldrich, A9647)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"77q6j","text":"Saponin (Sigma-Aldrich, 47036-50G)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"av50o","text":"Fluoromount-G (SouthernBiotech, 0100-01)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Remove medium and add 4% PFA to the cells. Note : For a coverslip in a 24 well plate use at least 300 µL /well.
Incubate 00:20:00 at Room temperature . For cells expressing light sensitive fluorescent proteins, cover the 24 well plate with aluminum foil to block out ambient light.
Collect PFA.
Perform the following washes with 1× PBS:
Wash with 1× PBS for 00:05:00 at Room temperature . (1/3)
Wash with 1× PBS for 00:05:00 at Room temperature . (2/3)
Wash with 1× PBS for 00:05:00 at Room temperature . (3/3)
Remove 1X PBS.
Add 300 µL /well of blocking solution. Blocking solution : 5% BSA [Bovine Serum Albumin] in 1× PBS + 0.1% Saponin
Incubate at least 00:15:00 at Room temperature .
Prepare primary antibody in blocking solution (typically 1:500, but can vary based on antibody staining).
Put a drop ( 50 µL ) of Primary antibody solution on the parafilm surface.
Remove the coverslips from the plate and gently put it upside-down on the antibody drop.
Incubate Overnight at 4 °C .
Perform the following washes:

Prepare secondary antibody in blocking solution (typically 1:500, but can vary based on antibody staining). Note : Keep in the dark. Keep the plate covered in aluminum foil if not doing so previously.
Put a drop ( 50 µL ) of secondary antibody solution on the parafilm.
Take the coverslips and put it upside-down on the antibody drop.
Incubate 01:00:00 at Room temperature in the dark (covered in foil).
Mount the slides:
Wash for 00:05:00 in blocking solution (1/3)
Wash for 00:05:00 in blocking solution. (2/3)
Wash for 00:05:00 in blocking solution. (3/3)
Put a drop ( 10 µL ) of Fluoromount-G on the slide.
Take out the coverslip from the plate.
Dry it by gently tapping the coverslip’s edge on a kimwipe.
Gently put the coverslips upside-down on the Fluoromount-G drop.
Leave it dry ( 24:00:00 , DARK, Room temperature ).
Store in a slide-box at 4 °C .
Alternatively, leave the coverslips in the well and add ( 250 µL ) of the primary antibody solution to each well.
Alternatively, leave the coverslips in the well and add ( 250 µL ) of the secondary antibody solution to each well.
Perform the following washes:
Wash for 00:05:00 in blocking solution (1/3)
Wash for 00:05:00 in blocking solution. (2/3)
Wash for 00:05:00 in blocking solution. (3/3)
Apply clear nail polish around the coverslips to ensure rigidity of the mount.
creator: Devin M. Fuller
